about.title: About
about.subtitle: Where tradition meets modern grooming excellence
about.storyText: Founded in 2010, Blade & Co started as a single-chair barbershop with a vision to bring premium grooming to everyone. Today, we're the city's most trusted destination for style and grooming.
about.missionText: We believe every client deserves a tailored experience. Our barbers combine years of training with genuine passion to deliver cuts that reflect your personality.
about.valuesText: Quality, craftsmanship, and community. We use only premium products, invest in continuous education, and give back through free haircuts for those in need.

contact.title: Get in
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.sent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Premium grooming experience since 2010. Where tradition meets modern style.

reviews.r1: Best fade I've ever had. Marcus is a true artist.
reviews.r2: The hot towel shave was incredible. So relaxing.
reviews.r3: Great atmosphere, skilled barbers. My go-to shop now.
reviews.r4: Sofia did amazing highlights. Highly recommend!
reviews.r5: Premium experience from start to finish. Worth every penny.
